samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light system with red, yellow, and green indicators, controlled by a pedestrian button.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button request signal.</input>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">Count value of the internal counter.</output>
        <output id="red">Red light output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow light output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green light output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state>idle = 2'b00</state>
        <state>s1_red = 2'b01</state>
        <state>s2_yellow = 2'b10</state>
        <state>s3_green = 2'b11</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="cnt" width="8">Internal counter for timing.</register>
        <register id="state" width="2">Current state of the traffic light controller.</register>
        <register id="p_red" width="1">Previous red signal.</register>
        <register id="p_yellow" width="1">Previous yellow signal.</register>
        <register id="p_green" width="1">Previous green signal.</register>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= idle;
            end else begin
                case (state)
                    idle: begin
                        state <= s1_red;
                    end
                    s1_red: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s3_green;
                        end
                    end
                    s2_yellow: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s1_red;
                        end
                    end
                    s3_green: begin
                        if (cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= s2_yellow;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        
        // Counting logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 10;
            end else begin
                if (pass_request && green) begin
                    cnt <= 10;
                end else if (!green && p_green) begin
                    cnt <= 60;
                end else if (!yellow && p_yellow) begin
                    cnt <= 5;
                end else if (!red && p_red) begin
                    cnt <= 10;
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt - 1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Assign outputs
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                red <= 0;
                yellow <= 0;
                green <= 0;
            end else begin
                red <= p_red;
                yellow <= p_yellow;
                green <= p_green;
            end
        end
        
        // Update previous states
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                p_red <= 0;
                p_yellow <= 0;
                p_green <= 0;
            end else begin
                p_red <= red;
                p_yellow <= yellow;
                p_green <= green;
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
